name: Once, A Blessing
descs:
[Effects apply only to #6 Deployed Identity]

When hitting an enemy with a Pierce Skill, gain 1 [Agility] and 1 [PenetrateDamageUp] next turn. (once per turn)

When defeating an enemy with the said Skill, gain 1 additional [Agility] next turn. (once per turn)

[Effects apply only to #5, #6 Deployed Identities]

When hitting an enemy with a Pierce Skill, gain 1 [Agility] and 1 [PenetrateDamageUp] next turn (once per turn for each Identity).

When defeating an enemy with the said Skill, gain 1 additional [Agility] and 1 additional [PenetrateDamageUp] next turn (once per turn for each Identity).

[Effects apply only to #5, #6 Deployed Identities]

When hitting an enemy with a Pierce Skill, gain 1 [Agility] and 1 [PenetrateDamageUp] next turn (2 times per turn for each Identity).

When defeating an enemy with the said Skill, gain 1 additional [Agility] and 2 additional [PenetrateDamageUp] next turn (once per turn for each Identity).
